1:
The hunters of Tailfeather have requested a particular set of goods found only within Loth ast Gnath. Unable to sneak past their heightened security, the Vath keeneye asks you to raid the enemy settlement in his stead. Your goal is to procure three jars of a special paste and three bags of blackloam.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level. Furthermore, you may not proceed with a class or job that is different from when you accepted this quest.
